scripts.build:install: npm run tauri build && sudo dpkg --install ./src-tauri/target/release/bundle/deb/Toka_${npm_package_version}_$(dpkg --print-architecture).deb
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:integration && wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:integration:live: npm run build:integration:live && wdio run wdio.live.conf.ts
scripts.build:integration: VITE_E2E=1 npm run tauri build -- --debug --no-bundle --features e2e --config src-tauri/tauri.e2e.conf.json
scripts.build:integration:live: VITE_E2E=1 npm run tauri build -- --debug --no-bundle --features webdriver --config src-tauri/tauri.e2e.conf.json
